evals.prompt: Navrhni a implementacne rozepis premium React komponentu pro dashboard rezervaci ve frontend-v2 vcetne TanStack Query, empty state, loading state a mobile chovani.
evals.expected_output: Repo-specific frontend navrh respektujici React 19, frontend-v2 structure, TanStack Query a mobilni UX.
expectations: Output odkazuje na frontend-v2, ne na legacy pages router.
Output pouziva TanStack Query a Axios patterns.
Output resi loading, empty a error state.

evals.prompt: Zhodnot a navrhni refaktor prihlasovaciho flow v React frontend-v2 vcetne forgot password a mobile UX detailu.
evals.expected_output: Frontend architektonicky a UX konzistentni navrh pro auth flow v aktualnim stacku.
expectations: Output pracuje s komponentami, hooky a route table v React appce.
Output zohledni path-based routing a offline/mobile constraints.
